#ad 저장!!✅ ㄹㅇ 아무도모르는 올영추천템!  어쩌다보니 올영에 없었는데(?) 새로 입점된 제품 여러개 소개해줬는데!!😖❤️ 🌷레노아는 진짜 빨래할 때 꼭 넣어봐!! 세일하면 가격도 다이소급이여서, 부담없이 써보는거 추천하구 날씨 한숨나오는 요즘ㅠㅠ 뭘 발라도 피부 애매~하면 세포랩 딱 첫단계에 써봐!!🫧 딱 세수 하자마자 요거 바르면 진짜 속수분만 딱!! 깔끔하게 잡히는데, 요거 위에 다른 스킨케어 올리면 그 제품 효과도 커진대!! 👉🏻 요건 올리브영에서 5/24 단 하루, 29,900원에 판매하니까 꼭 세일할 때 입문 추천!! 👩🏻‍🦰 리필드는 몇번이나!! 추천해 준 제품인데, 더워지면 진짜 진가를 발휘하는..<3 난 머리 다 마르기 전에!! 사용해주고, 두피까지 꼼꼼히 말려주는게 제일 떡 안지고 좋더라구!! 요것도 기다렸다가 올영세일 때 구매 추천🌟 #세포랩 #바이오제닉에센스블렌디드포뮬라 #화잘먹에센스 #촉촉결광에센스 #올리브영에센스

RECIPE BELOW: Homemade crockpot human grade dog food. We’re not only about our own self improvement around here. We’re trying to level up our dog’s life as well. I take my role as a dog mom very seriously. 🐾🫶🏼 always consult with your vet obviously lol  Ingredients 4 lbs Lean Ground Turkey (or 90% lean ground beef) 1 lb Chicken Livers or Hearts (finely chopped - optional) 3 cups Brown Rice or Oats  4 cups Chopped Fresh Spinach or Kale 3 cups Shredded Carrots 2 cups Finely Chopped Zucchini High for 3-4 hours or low 8-9 hours  #dogfood #dogmom #crockpot #dogs #healthydog

these cosmic brownie cake pops are about to be your new favorite little treat after dinner 🍫💫 Ingredients: 8 individual cosmic brownies 3-4 tbs chocolate frosting rainbow candy coated chocolate chips 1 cup chocolate chips dab of coconut oil Instructions:  In a large bowl, mash together cosmic brownies and frosting to form a dough ball. Separate small sections of brownie dough and roll into balls. Place on a parchment-lined surface and allow to set in the fridge until firm. In a small microwave-safe bowl, microwave chocolate chips and coconut oil for 30-second increments, stirring each time until melted with a glossy consistency. Once dough balls are firm, cover in melted chocolate and sprinkle with rainbow candy coated chocolate chips. Allow assembled cake pops to set in fridge until chocolate has hardened, insert a cake pop stick in the bottom of each one, and enjoy! 😋 #brownies #Recipe #dessert #chocolate #creatorsearchinsights

How I got my cat to be comfortable with opening mouth  Tips:  1. Whiskers are very sensitive, please take things slow, give lots of breaks, and be patient and gentle with your kitties 2. Don’t force mouth open or hold for extended amount of time as part of desensitization  3. Kitty will likely resist at first, be gentle and patient. You’re making progress even if they open a tiny bit or open for a moment This has made Mogi’s dental care and vet exams so easy. I can also fish things out of his mouth when things get stuck or if he eats something he’s not supposed to.  #cat #kitten #catsoftiktok #cutecat #fyp

The Bengal 🐆cat is a unique domestic breed known for its wild leopard-like appearance and highly active personality. Its coat features striking spotted or marbled patterns that resemble a miniature wild cat, making it one of the most visually exotic cat breeds in the world. Despite its wild look, the Bengal is fully domestic and forms strong bonds with its owner. This breed is highly intelligent, curious, and energetic. Bengals enjoy climbing, exploring, and interactive play, and they require mental stimulation to stay happy. They are social cats that can be very affectionate, but they also demand attention and an engaging environment. When properly cared for, the Bengal cat becomes a loyal, entertaining, and dynamic companion 🫶🏼 #bengalcat #bengalkitten #bengalkedisi #bengalcats #fypage

@Macca's just dropped a World Menu Heist in Australia and it has international favourites from Japan, Canada, the UK and the US! What we tried: • Teriyaki Chicken Burger (Japan 🇯🇵) • Garlic & Black Pepper McNuggets (Japan 🇯🇵) ⭐ • Benny-Style Bacon ‘N Egg Bagel (Canada 🇨🇦) • Philly Cheese Stack (UK 🇬🇧) ⭐ • Special Edition Gold Sauce (US 🇺🇸) [A D]  #mcdonaldsaustralia #mcdonaldsau #worldheistmenu #maccas

McDonald's Australia has announced its biggest menu change in 17 years, introducing five new menu items showcasing the latest flavour trends around the world. 우리 신안철거가 수도권 철거 1등이야~~!!! 안녕하세요! 철거하는 50대 아조씨입니다!!🙋‍♂️ 만약 철거업체를 구하고 계시는 분들이라면, 아래 저희 [신안철거 소개글]을 읽어주시고 제 [프로필 링크]도 한번씩 방문해보셨으면 좋겠습니다!💕 저희 [신안철거]에 대한 정보뿐만 아니라, 자영업자와 소상공인분들이 도움되실 수 있는 정보까지 모두 적어놓았습니다! 항상 감사합니다!!☺️ - 안녕하세요. #철거 하는 50대 아조씨, 신안철거 대표 조성철입니다! 저희 #신안철거 는 서울/경기/인천 수도권 전지역 철거를 하고 있는데요! 2026년 자영업 소상공인만 무려 600만명인 시대에 약 10곳 중 8곳은 3년 이내로 폐업하는 현실, 그로 인해 철거 업체는 더더욱 많아지고 있지만 좋은 철거 업체는 점점 줄어들고 있는 현실, 그래서 저희 신안철거는 어떻게 하면 더 좋은 철거업체가 되어 가장 먼저 발벗고 나서 도울 수 있을까 생각하며 오늘도 열심히 철거 현장에 나서고 있습니다. 특히나 철거, 폐기물 처리 작업은 최소 비용이 수십, 수천만원이 기본 단위이기 때문에 #철거업체 를 찾고 계시는 분들은 어떤 철거 업체를 써야 하는지, 철거를 할 때 알아야 하는 정보들은 정확히 무엇인지 몰라 고민하거나, 이미 철거 업체와 작업을 했는데 업체를 잘못 선택해서 후회하시는 분들이 정말 많은데요. 앞으로 저희 신안철거가 직접 나서서 도와드리도록 노력하려고, 조금 어렵지만 많은 분들이 볼 수 있게 SNS라는 걸 직접 시작하게 됐습니다. 📣 만약 철거 업체를 찾고 있는데 어떤 업체를 해야 하나 고민이신 분들은, 🔗 제 프로필 링크에 저희 신안철거에 대한 모든 정보와 철거에 대한 도움되는 정보까지 모두 적어놓았으니 꼭 읽어봐주시면 감사드리겠습니다! 무료 현장 방문을 통해 가장 합리적인 비용으로 견적을 내어드리고, 불필요한 추가 비용은 요구하지 않는 정직한 철거 업체, 신안철거가 되겠습니다. 서울 / 경기 / 인천 수도권 철거는 <신안철거> @sinancheolgeo_official 친절 상담 / 무료 현장 방문 / 가장 합리적인 견적 / 민원 발생 ZERO 도전! (영상에 나오는 제가 직접 상담, 무료 현장 방문합니다!) #신안철거 팔로우 해주시고 앞으로도 자주 뵈어요. 감사합니다!😊

Малышка йорк Ева 🌸 Иногда груминг не для красоты, а для комфорта и облегчения процедуры.  Ева была вынуждена сделать перерыв в процедурах, а дома не получалось во время ухаживать, но как только такая возможность появилась, то она сразу пришла убрать все лишнее 😉 Уважаемые клиенты, если Вы видите, что у Вас или у Ваших близких есть питомцы, которые нуждаются в уходе, то не стесняйтесь, записывайте малышей на груминг. Особенно это касается наших бабушек и дедушек, Вы можете помочь облегчить жизнь им и им питомцам 🙏🏾 #груминг #собака #йорк

This routine is for anyone who is not dealing with extreme damage but wants over all glossier & softer hair this is the the exact routine I built for getting glass hair on fine hair but will work for the wavy curly hair girls too!!  the science: the flatten your cuticle lies, the more light it reflects that's what gives the illusion of glass. glossy hair isn't a product, it's the consistency of routine over time that’s keeping that cuticle smooth from prewash to final styling  it took me a while to figure out the system, but once I did, the results compounded and now I wanna share my favourite tips with you because this is the routine that actually for every  wash day. the 5 things I never skip: 1. always create a barrier before shampoo: hair oil or conditioner first. less friction = less cuticle damage = more shine 2. weekly hair mask. deep hydration is what keeps that cuticle flat and the shine consistent. 3. a glossing treatment every 3-4 weeks  this is the step that takes glossy to glass  4. leave-in conditioner every single wash. beats frizz and keeps the cuticle flat between washes. 5. the hair sandwich method oil before heat styling AND after. then always finish with a cool shot to lock the cuticle in place ✨ Hope these haircare tips help you guys!! #hair #haircare #glasshair #hairgloss

the hair care routine that keeps my hair healthy ✨    all products linked on my shopmy which is linked in my bio    here’s the exact timeframe i follow each week: • i oil my hair 1–3x a week • i wash my hair based on oiliness, usually about every 2 days. i don’t follow a strict wash schedule • i use either a milk treatment, protein treatment, hair mask, or hair gloss about once a week #haircare #hairtok #healthyhair #hairroutine #hairtreatment

Thank you @Dessy | Health + Beauty + Tech for letting me review this recipe! It has really good bones, but is missing 6 vital nutrients so I’m sharing what I would add to help balance things out 💕 And a few more notes here: 🫘 Kidney beans are technically safe, but since the verdict is still out on whether legumes are involved in the development of DCM (a form of heart disease), so I personally suggest to avoid them. If you do include them, limit to no more than 5-10% of the total volume of food (like you did in this recipe!) ⚖️ There are many different ways we could balance out this recipe, but no matter what it’s crucial to use the right amount of each ingredient and supplement so please do not attempt this without the proper formulation tools. If you need more help putting together a balanced recipe, head to the link on my profile and grab my free guides/recipes! #homemadedogfood #dogfoodrecipe #dogfood #freshdogfood

#92i #makeup Le “92i makeup” fait référence à un style de maquillage inspiré de l’univers du rap français, surtout lié à Booba et à son label 92i (“92 International”, en référence au département des Hauts-de-Seine). Sur les réseaux sociaux, ce terme désigne un maquillage au style urbain et confiant : teint très net, contouring marqué, regard intense avec eyeliner ou faux cils, lèvres bien dessinées et une attitude sûre de soi. Ce n’est pas une technique officielle de maquillage, mais plutôt une esthétique inspirée du luxe, de la street culture et d’une image forte et assumée.

“But she’s just a corgi…”  Meet Maple the 4 year old Corgi.  Sweet in the right moments… but dangerous in the wrong ones. Resource guarding food and household items. Multiple bites on owners and family members. Reactive to other dogs on walks, barking & lunging. And now there’s a baby in the home. During the evaluation, Maple tried to bite me multiple times. Not because she’s a “bad dog”… But because she’s been making decisions for a long time without clear direction. No real structure. No consistent boundaries. No clear communication or expectations. And when you let “dogs be dogs” they do just that.  This is the part people struggle with.. You can love your dog deeply and still be missing the leadership they actually need. Honest question… Do you think dogs like Maple know they’re doing something wrong… or are they just doing what’s always worked for them? #DogTraining #dogtrainer #dogsoftiktok #dogs #dog

As promised, this is my current scalp care routine! I previously didn’t think additional scalp care would do much for me, but the research behind the Pantene Abundant & Strong system (and all the research I’ve found on other scalp ingredients / products since) really changed my mind. Now I think about my scalp care routine as a proactive routine to keep my scalp + new hair growth in the healthiest state possible. This isn’t a routine that I think everyone *needs* to do, but for those who are also interested in promoting scalp health & improving hair retention, hopefully this gives you some steps to choose from that might help! Also- the results I’ve seen would only be from the scalp serums + shampoos alone because I haven’t been using the scalp device or red light helmet long enough to see any visible change yet. LMK if you want videos on my top recommendations for scalp serums + scalp focused shampoos next! Products Mentioned: 1. Pantene Abundant & Strong Serum 2. Neutrogena Hair Restore Serum  3. OGX Pro Growth + Peptide Shampoo 4. Dr Groot Scalp Revitalizing Hair Thickening Shampoo 5. DS Labs Scalp Activator - this was gifted with no obligation to review 6. Current Body Red Light Helmet - this was gifted with no obligation to review #scalpcare #hairroutine #haircareroutine #healthyhair
